name: Odama
description:
Odama (大玉) is Kodama's grandfather. He lives in Fireworks Island. He wears kabuki make-up and has a rude attitude, though he still felt sad for the lost of Kodama's parents. At first, Odama refused to allow her grand-daughter to release the Ball 205 due to its destructive capabilities, but, thanks to Usopp, he decides to release it, making Kodama's dream come true.  First Appearance:	Episode 134 

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
